request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about What are Life Processes?. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Definition of Life Processes. Must show visually: Activities performed by all living organisms to sustain life; They are continuous and automatic (do not stop); Key Processes: Nutrition, Respiration, Transportation, Excretion. Visual goal: A labelled classroom diagram for What are Life Processes? that makes the process or structure visible while the teacher explains definition-card.. Teaching context: Provide a clear, concise definition and list the four main processes covered in this chapter.. Student takeaway: Students can define life processes as essential activities that maintain life.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, class...
request.negativePrompt: text, labels, captions, numbers, watermark, decorative clutter, formula text, axis labels, diagram callouts, presentation slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, poster layout, infographic layout, ui card, worksheet, powerpoint slide, presentation template
